hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -x "$d/.claude/hooks/guard-destructive-git.sh" ] && { printf '%s\n' "$INPUT" | "$d/.claude/hooks/guard-destructive-git.sh"; exit $?; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -x "$d/.claude/hooks/guard-git-merge.sh" ] && { printf '%s\n' "$INPUT" | "$d/.claude/hooks/guard-git-merge.sh"; exit $?; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -x "$d/.claude/hooks/guard-worktree-discipline.sh" ] && { printf '%s\n' "$INPUT" | "$d/.claude/hooks/guard-worktree-discipline.sh"; exit $?; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -x "$d/.claude/hooks/load-session-context.sh" ] && { printf '%s\n' "$INPUT" | "$d/.claude/hooks/load-session-context.sh"; exit $?; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0

if [ -f .claude/product-team/config.json ]; then node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude/product-team/config.json','utf8')); if(c.project_url){process.exit(0)}else{process.exit(0)}" && echo "Session config loaded. Use the team-lead skill to continue working on the product."; fi

INPUT=$(cat); d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -x "$d/.claude/hooks/log-agent-event.sh" ] && { printf '%s\n' "$INPUT" | "$d/.claude/hooks/log-agent-event.sh"; exit $?; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -x "$d/.claude/hooks/log-agent-event.sh" ] && { printf '%s\n' "$INPUT" | "$d/.claude/hooks/log-agent-event.sh"; exit $?; }; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0
